steps.title: Close the quote and clause
steps.content: The blank must close Alfred Nobel's quoted phrase and then separate it from the next independent clause about what judges recognized in 2011. A semicolon can link the two independent clauses.

steps.title: Test the punctuation choices
steps.content: B creates an awkward and unnecessary continuation with "and,". C closes the quotation but leaves two independent clauses fused. D fails to close the quotation before the next clause begins. The answer is A.
